actions.expression:
SELECT kh.company_name,
       kh.company_name,
       kh.address,
       kh.phone,
       kh.web,
       kh.wfgs,
       kh.email,
       kh.fax,
       kh.bm,
       kh.ywry,
       kh.zffs
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.kh_id=:kh_id) 
  AND ((:qxjb1 =2) 
  OR ( EXISTS(
SELECT sys_security.sid 
FROM sys_security,sys_users 
WHERE sys_security.pid=kh.sid 
  AND sys_security.module='客户资料' 
  AND sys_security.permission like "%读取%" 
  AND (not sys_security.rejection like "%读取%") 
  AND sys_security.objectkind=1 
  AND sys_security.objectSerialID=sys_users.sid 
  AND sys_users.name=:c_user)) 
  OR ( EXISTS(
SELECT sys_security.sid 
FROM sys_security,sys_roles 
WHERE sys_security.pid=kh.sid 
  AND sys_security.module='客户资料' 
  AND sys_security.permission like "%读取%" 
  AND (not sys_security.rejection like "%读取%") 
  AND sys_security.objectkind=0 
  AND sys_security.objectSerialID=sys_roles.sid 
  AND sys_security.objectSerialID IN (
SELECT sys_userrole.roleSerialID 
FROM sys_userrole,sys_users 
WHERE sys_users.name=:c_user 
  AND sys_users.sid=sys_userrole.userSerialID)))) LIMIT 1

FROM xbzxsheet 
WHERE (xbzxsheet.ssmk="国家代码") 
ORDER BY xbzxsheet.mc ASC

FROM xbzxsheet

view.params:
SELECT kh.kh_id
FROM kh
WHERE   ((:qxjb1 =2) OR ( EXISTS(select sys_security.SID from sys_security,sys_users WHERE sys_security.PID=kh.SID AND sys_security.module='客户资料' AND sys_security.permission like "%读取%" and (not sys_security.rejection like "%读取%") AND sys_security.objectkind=1 AND sys_security.objectSID=sys_users.SID AND sys_users.name=:c_user)) OR ( EXISTS(select sys_security.SID from sys_security,sys_roles WHERE sys_security.PID=kh.SID AND sys_security.module='客户资料' AND sys_security.permission like "%读取%" and (not sys_security.rejection like "%读取%") AND sys_security.objectkind=0 AND sys_security.objectSID=sys_roles.SID AND sys_security.objectSID IN (SELECT sys_userrole.roleSID FROM sys_userrole,sys_users WHERE sys_users.name=:c_user AND sys_users.SID=sys_userrole.userSID))))
ORDER BY kh.kh_id ASC

SELECT zxtc.company_name,zxtc.SID
FROM zxtc
WHERE   (zxtc.xbsq=:xbsq)
ORDER BY zxtc.SID ASC
